title: New political party being founded in Latvia
summary_full: "Alternative for Latvia" (Alternatīva Latvijai) is the name chosen for a future political party, whose founders gathered for their first congress on Saturday. The name has an obvious echo of the far right "Alternative for Germany" (Alternative für Deutschland) party in Germany.
